description: Replace all bracketed placeholders in the commercial lease agreement template at /home/ga/Documents/commercial_lease.odt with the following values: [LANDLORD_NAME] (Meridian Properties LLC), [TENANT_NAME] (Coastal Brewing Company), [PROPERTY_ADDRESS] (1847 Harbor Boulevard, Suite 200, Oceanside, CA 92054), [EFFECTIVE_DATE] (January 15, 2026), [LEASE_TERM] (Five (5) years), [MONTHLY_RENT] ($8,750.00), [SECURITY_DEPOSIT] ($17,500.00), [PERMITTED_USE] (Craft brewery taproom and retail sales), [LANDLORD_ADDRESS] (500 Pacific Coast Highway, Suite 100, Carlsbad, CA 92008), [TENANT_ADDRESS] (2200 Mission Avenue, Oceanside, CA 92054), [COMMENCEMENT_DATE] (March 1, 2026), and [EXPIRATION_DATE] (February 28, 2031). Format the document with a bold, centered 14pt title, Heading 1 style for Article headings, Heading 2 style for Section subheadings, and 12pt justified body text. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/commercial_lease.odt.
